name: Memory Bridge
description: Bridges file-based memory (SESSION-STATE, LESSONS) into agent context. Injects session state before prompts, appends to daily logs after runs.

injectHighRiskLessons.description: Inject high-severity lessons before prompt build

autoDailyLog.description: Append agent run results to daily log

maxSessionStateChars.description: Maximum SESSION-STATE.md characters injected per turn

maxHighRiskLessons.description: Maximum number of high-risk lessons to inject

maxLessonChars.description: Maximum lesson block characters injected per turn
